description_long: This is a modern city bus with a rectangular, boxy shape and a flat roof, painted in a tri-color scheme of green, blue, and white. The bus features large, rectangular side windows arranged in a row, with a single wide passenger door on the right side near the front. The front of the bus displays a digital sign with route information in Japanese, and accessibility symbols are visible, indicating wheelchair access. The roof has two large circular ventilation or air conditioning units, and the bus is marked with 'OSAKA CITY BUS' branding on the side. The wheels are black with visible hubcaps, and the overall design is streamlined for urban public transportation.
description: A modern, boxy city bus in green, blue, and white with large side windows, a single passenger door, and Osaka City Bus branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the right side of the bus with a single wide passenger door, large rectangular windows, and the 'OSAKA CITY BUS' logo.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back panel with accessibility symbols, route information, and the bus's roof-mounted ventilation units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with large windows and no visible passenger doors, highlighting the blue and green color blocks.
description_view_3: Front view showing the windshield, headlights, digital route sign in Japanese, and green color dominating the front fascia.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, rectangular passenger windows evenly spaced along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with a consistent height and width.
attribute_route_number_or_destination_si: 10-5009 (on roof and rear), Japanese destination sign on front and rear digital panels
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: Circular blue logo with a wave motif and 'OSAKA CITY BUS' text on the side and front panels.
